description_long: This is a tall, slender bottle with a narrow neck and a cork stopper at the top. The upper portion of the bottle is a solid gray color, while the lower half features a marbled blue and white pattern, giving it a decorative and artistic appearance. The bottle appears to be made primarily of glass, with the marbled effect likely painted or printed onto the surface. The cork at the top is a natural brown, contrasting with the rest of the bottle. The surface of the bottle is smooth and hard, typical of glass, and the overall shape is cylindrical with a gentle taper toward the neck. There are no visible labels, logos, or text on the exterior.
description: A tall, slender bottle with a gray upper half and a marbled blue-and-white lower half, topped with a cork. The surface is smooth and decorative, with no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bottle's gray upper half and the marbled blue-and-white lower half, with the cork clearly visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights a slightly different section of the marbled pattern, with more blue visible on the lower half.
description_view_2: The marbled pattern appears more blended and less distinct, with the gray upper half remaining consistent.
description_view_3: This view shows a prominent blue patch in the marbled area, with the cork and gray upper half unchanged.
